name: Deluxe Kit
description: The most complete pen plating kit available. Covers the full range: Absorbent, Nickel, Gold 24K, Silver, Chrome Color, and Copper.

name: Deluxe Kit (Heavy Duty)
description: Premium heavy-duty complete kit. Silver-Heavy, Copper-Heavy, Gold 24K-Heavy, Nickel-Heavy, Rhodium, and Absorbent pens included.

name: Contact Repair Kit
description: Complete repair kit for electronic component restoration. Includes power supply, connector cables, Absorbent, Nickel, and 24K Gold pen.

name: Contact Repair Kit (Heavy Duty)
description: Heavy-duty version for thicker substrates. Includes HD power supply, cables, and heavy-duty Absorbent, Nickel, and Gold pens.

name: Absorbent / Degreaser Pen
description: Essential first step in any plating process. Cleans and degreases all metal surfaces (except stainless steel) before plating.

name: Gold 24K Plating Pen
description: Plate pure 24-karat gold onto gold, nickel, or silver surfaces. Ideal for electrical contacts, jewelry repair, and decorative work.

name: Gold 18K Plating Pen
description: Plate 18K gold for jewelry and decorative applications where a warmer tone is preferred over 24K.

name: Gold 14K Plating Pen
description: Plate 14K gold over gold, silver, or nickel surfaces — the most popular karat for jewelry applications.

name: Nickel Plating Pen
description: Plate nickel over copper surfaces. Apply copper flash first on non-copper substrates. Essential underlayer for many plating sequences.

name: Black Nickel Plating Pen
description: Deposit black nickel for decorative and functional applications. Apply copper flash first on non-copper surfaces.

name: Silver Plating Pen
description: Plate silver onto any metallic surface except aluminum or chromium. Common for electrical contacts, silverware restoration, and jewelry.

name: Chrome Color Plating Pen
description: Apply a chrome-colored finish over copper. Apply copper flash first on non-copper surfaces.

name: Copper Plating Pen
description: Plate copper over any metallic surface (not aluminum or chromium). Used as an intermediate flash layer for other platings.

name: Rhodium Plating Pen
description: Premium rhodium plating for the hardest, most reflective finish available. Plate over nickel — apply copper flash and nickel first on non-copper surfaces.

name: Tin Plating Pen
description: Plate tin over any metallic surface (not aluminum or chromium). Widely used in electronics for solderability enhancement.

name: Zinc Plating Pen
description: Plate zinc over metallic surfaces for corrosion protection and galvanic applications (not aluminum or chromium).

name: Palladium Plating Pen
description: Plate palladium for corrosion-resistant, tarnish-proof finishes. Widely used in electronics and fine jewelry as a white-metal alternative to rhodium.

name: Gold 24K Heavy Duty Pen
description: Heavy-duty 24K gold pen for thicker gold deposits on high-wear surfaces. Greater plating volume per cartridge than the standard pen.

name: Gold 18K Heavy Duty Pen
description: Heavy-duty 18K gold pen for thicker deposits. Ideal for high-contact jewelry and industrial components requiring a durable gold finish.

name: Silver Heavy Duty Pen
description: Heavy-duty silver pen for thicker silver deposits on electrical contacts, silverware restoration, and large surface jewelry work.

name: Copper Heavy Duty Pen
description: Heavy-duty copper pen for thick copper plating and buildup applications. Ideal as a heavy flash layer on large industrial parts.

name: Nickel Heavy Duty Pen
description: Heavy-duty nickel pen for thick nickel deposits. Used as a heavy underlayer for gold, rhodium, and other precious metal platings.

name: Stainless Steel Degreaser Pen
description: Specialized degreaser for stainless steel surfaces prior to plating. Standard degreaser cannot prep stainless — this is the correct solution.

name: Connector Cables
description: Replacement connector cables for attaching Micro-Metallizer pens to the power supply.

name: Power Supply
description: Variable DC power supply, 110V/60Hz or 220V/50Hz. Drives all Micro-Metallizer plating pens.

name: Carbitron 300 System
description: Professional tungsten carbide coating system. The original diamond dusting platform for medical instruments, tooling, and industrial applications.

name: Micro-Jet 200 System
description: Precision micro-abrasive blasting for cleaning, etching, and surface preparation on small or delicate components.
